[cron:investment-research-background-preopen-0840 08:40来福投研会-盘前值班] 执行以下任务：
1. 进入 /Users/ling/.openclaw/workspace
2. 运行 python3 scripts/run_investment_research_background_cycle.py --cycle pre_open
3. 读取 cycle md/json 输出
4. 用中文简短汇报：当前风险状态、优先候选、值班角色、周期总览文件路径
5. 非交易时段不要给可执行买价，只给方向、优先级和触发条件
Current time: Thursday, April 30th, 2026 - 9:04 AM (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-04-30 01:04 UTC

Use the message tool if you need to notify the user directly for the current chat. If you do not send directly, your final plain-text reply will be delivered automatically.
